---
#title: "English Writing"
#description: |
#  <br>This is a home for my English writing practice<br>
#  I believe in *less is more*
listing: 
  contents: 
    - "**/index.qmd"
    - "**/index.markdown"
    - "**/index.md"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, author, categories, date, image]
  image-align: right
  # image-height: 10em
  page-size: 5
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true

header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/listing-default.css">
resources:
  - ../assets/listing-default.css
  
comments: false
---
